title: thymus serpyllum f. sylvestris
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. sylvestris, also known as wild thyme or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen herb with tiny leaves and pink or white flowers. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. sylvestris include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or infusion, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
